mapper.insert: insert into manager(username, password, roleID, name, addTime, updateTime) values (#{username}, #{password}, #{roleID}, #{name}, #{addTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: update manager set username=#{username}, password=#{password}, roleID=#{roleID}, name=#{name}, isLock=#{isLock}, updateTime=#{updateTime} where id=#{id}
mapper.select: select * from manager where username=#{username} and password=#{password}
select * from manager order by id
mapper.update: update manager set isLock=#{isLock} where id=#{id}
update manager set password=#{newPsd} where id=#{id} and password=#{oldPsd}
